summary: Workflow has critical supply-chain and requirements violations: (1) Actions not pinned to SHA—checkout@v4, setup-python@v5, upload-artifact@v4 must use full-length commit SHAs with version comments, per best practices. (2) Task explicitly requires actionlint validation; workflow uses Python YAML parsing instead—add actionlint step. (3) Line 51 hardcodes 'grep -q "14 passed"'—fragile if test count changes; parse exit code instead. (4) Script's **→* glob conversion (line 45) oversimplifies recursive matching; 'docs/**' won't match 'docs/nested/deep/file.md'. Script docstrings and types are good, logic is clean, but workflow is not production-ready.
